docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $290.00 FILED BY CHUCK, DOUGLAS AS TO DEFENDANT MASSIS, NIMER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-15-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR.
